hindi: जय शिव शंकर, जय शिव शंकर। बम बम भोले नमो नमः॥
english: Victory to Shiva Shankar; Hail to the simple-hearted Bhole, salutations to you
roman: Jai Shiv Shankar, Jai Shiv Shankar, Bam Bam Bhole Namo Namah

hindi: नील कंठ, महाकाल, महेश्वर, त्रिभुवन पालक। उमा रमण, जगदीश, शिवशंकर, दीनन के पालक॥
english: Blue-throated, Mahakal, Maheshwara, protector of three worlds; lover of Uma, Lord of the universe, sustainer of the humble
roman: Neelkanth Mahakaal Maheshwar Tribhuvan Palak, Uma Raman Jagdish Shiv Shankar Deenan Ke Palak

hindi: गंगा जमुना बहे जटा से, शीश चंद्र सोहे। शूल त्रिशूल लिए हाथ में, सब जग मन मोहे॥
english: Ganga and Yamuna flow from his matted hair, the moon shines on his head; holding trident in hand, he enchants all the world
roman: Ganga Jamuna Bahe Jata Se, Shish Chandra Sohe, Shool Trishool Liye Haath Mein, Sab Jag Man Mohe

hindi: डमरू बजाते नाचते हैं, नंदी संग सोहे। मुंडमाल गल में दमके, भस्म रमाए देहे॥
english: He dances playing the damru, shining with Nandi beside him; skull garland gleams at his neck, body smeared with sacred ash
roman: Damru Bajate Nachate Hain, Nandi Sang Sohe, Mundmaal Gal Mein Damke, Bhasm Ramaye Dehe

hindi: जय शिव शंकर, जय शिव शंकर। बम बम भोले नमो नमः॥
english: Victory to Shiva Shankar, hail to the simple-hearted Bhole
roman: Jai Shiv Shankar, Jai Shiv Shankar, Bam Bam Bhole Namo Namah
